name: Maya Okafor
company_description: Solo creator with 180k YouTube subs and 2 part-time editors; monetizes via AdSense + occasional sponsorships.
goals_for_this_visit: See if I can start taking deals without talking to a salesperson
Understand how fast payouts are
Find out if my niche is eligible
current_alternatives: Direct DMs from brands via email
pain_quotes_in_voice: Every sponsorship deal eats two days of back-and-forth — I just want a dashboard that shows live briefs
If I have to email someone to sign up I'm out, I've got videos to edit
top_objections: Brand-safety filters that exclude tech/gaming niches
hot_buttons: Instant visibility into active brand briefs
behavioral_markers_activated: Jumps to pricing or CTA immediately
_coverage_purpose: Tests the ideal happy-path flow for creators who move fast and self-serve.

_source_pain_samples.quote: Sponsorship outreach eats my whole week

name: Diego Hernández
company_description: Runs a weekly Spanish-language business podcast (12k listeners/ep) and a 22k-subscriber newsletter on LATAM startups.
goals_for_this_visit: Figure out who else uses this — real creators, not stock-photo faces
Know the revenue share before I commit
Verify my audience is big enough
pain_quotes_in_voice: Every ad platform says they're 'creator-first' and then takes 30%
I've been burned by platforms that promised reach and delivered $12 a month
top_objections: Unclear how they match advertisers to content
hot_buttons: Public case studies with earnings numbers
deal_breakers: Generic marketing copy with no specifics
No way to preview advertiser quality
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether the pitch survives scrutiny from an experienced creator who's been burned.

_source_pain_samples.quote: Platforms promise reach and deliver pennies

name: Priya Raman
company_description: Full-time Twitch partner, ~800 avg concurrent, monetizes via subs + bits + occasional brand deals.
goals_for_this_visit: Find free or low-commission deals that actually fit gaming
Avoid anything that requires paid tiers to unlock brands
current_alternatives: Brands reaching out via Twitter DM
pain_quotes_in_voice: Streamers get screwed by platforms — we're treated like an afterthought next to YouTube
If I have to pay upfront just to see brands I'm closing the tab
top_objections: Pricing tiers that paywall brand access
deal_breakers: Brand-safety filter that kills gaming content
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether the monetization model works for creators with tight margins.

_source_pain_samples.quote: Streamers get treated as an afterthought

name: Léa Dubois
company_description: French beauty & skincare TikTok (420k followers), also runs her own small DTC skincare brand shipping in EU.
goals_for_this_visit: Can I both sell ads on my TikTok AND advertise my DTC brand from one account?
How quickly can I activate a campaign
pain_quotes_in_voice: I wear two hats — creator and brand — and every tool forces me to pick a side
Creator marketplaces move at a crawl, meanwhile trends die in 3 days
top_objections: Can't be on both sides of the marketplace
hot_buttons: Dual-role support (creator + advertiser from one login)
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether the platform supports creators who are also advertisers (dual-role).

_source_pain_samples.quote: Every tool forces me to pick a side

name: Marcus Chen
company_description: Runs 4 faceless YouTube channels (finance, history, science) each 50–300k subs, outsourced production team of 5.
goals_for_this_visit: Can I manage multiple channels under one account?
Is there any channel-size minimum?
What's the actual ad fill-rate and CPM
pain_quotes_in_voice: Most ad platforms cap you at one channel — useless if you run a portfolio
I've done enough of these to know 'we fill every slot' means they fill maybe 40%
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether pro creators running multiple properties can operate at scale.

name: Sofia Marino
role: Head of Growth at B2B SaaS (HR tech)
company_description: HR software for mid-market (series B, 180 employees), $2M/yr paid-media budget across LinkedIn/Google/Reddit.
goals_for_this_visit: Can I actually measure ROI on creator sponsorships?
Are there real B2B creators on this platform or just lifestyle
What's the fraud/brand-safety posture
pain_quotes_in_voice: Creator platforms are built for DTC brands selling mascara — I sell HRIS software to CFOs
Half the 'creators' on these platforms have fake engagement and the platforms know it
top_objections: No case studies in B2B SaaS
hot_buttons: Named creator references in enterprise B2B
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether the platform is credible to a mid-market B2B advertiser with budget.

_source_pain_samples.quote: Half these platforms have fake engagement

name: Jamal Thompson
role: Performance marketer at DTC fashion brand
company_description: DTC streetwear brand (~$8M ARR, Shopify), runs Meta + TikTok ads, looking to diversify away from Meta.
goals_for_this_visit: Spin up a creator campaign this week
Reach Gen-Z on TikTok/IG outside Meta ads manager
Test before committing budget
pain_quotes_in_voice: Meta CAC is eating us alive and we need a channel that works by Friday
Every creator platform wants a 3-week onboarding call — I just want to launch an ad
hot_buttons: Creators discoverable by audience not by emails
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether a self-serve advertiser can launch a campaign in minutes.

_source_pain_samples.quote: Meta CAC is eating us alive

name: Hannah Becker
company_description: Boutique performance agency in Berlin, 14 people, manages ~€5M/yr paid media for 12 DTC + B2B clients.
goals_for_this_visit: Manage campaigns for multiple client brands from one dashboard
Keep platform fee predictable
Get EU-data-residency compliance
pain_quotes_in_voice: Agency pricing on these platforms is insane — €30k/yr SaaS + a % per campaign
If I can't bill my clients separately with clear line items I'm not using it
top_objections: Per-seat pricing that kills agency margins
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether the pricing and model support agencies buying on behalf of multiple clients.

_source_pain_samples.quote: Agency pricing is €30k/yr plus a cut

name: Rafael Santos
company_description: São Paulo seed-stage neobank for freelancers, 14 employees, early revenue, working in 3 LATAM markets.
goals_for_this_visit: Find Portuguese/Spanish-speaking creators for LATAM
Spend less than $2k/mo to validate
Know if this is regulated-industry-friendly (fintech)
pain_quotes_in_voice: Every creator platform has only US/EU creators — LATAM is always 'coming soon'
As a fintech I need brand-safe, compliant creators and most platforms hand-wave that
_coverage_purpose: Tests geographic + vertical coverage for an early-stage LATAM fintech advertiser.

name: Emma Larsen
role: Brand Marketing Lead at Series C consumer app
company_description: Consumer wellness app (mental health, 2M MAU), Series C, 90 employees, $12M annual brand budget.
goals_for_this_visit: Validate brand-safety posture for a mental-health brand
See creator vetting process
Confirm fraud detection / real engagement
pain_quotes_in_voice: We work in mental health — the wrong creator partnership can become a PR crisis overnight
Platforms that don't show me their vetting process don't have one
_coverage_purpose: Tests whether the platform satisfies enterprise-grade brand-safety requirements.

_source_pain_samples.quote: A wrong partnership becomes a PR crisis
